response.justification: The candidate brings well over the required 6 years of full-stack experience with strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB depth, plus current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work that directly matches a rare requirement. Cloud (AWS CDK), Docker/Kubernetes, and a demonstrated testing culture (TDD, test-framework authorship, testing workshops) round out the profile. Gaps are the absence of Nest.js, Kotlin, and Python, and much of the deep systems work is in DLang rather than the primary stack, but the breadth and craftsmanship signals outweigh these.
strengths: 13+ years of full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB across product and platform work
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience, directly matching the AI agent development requirement
Strong engineering culture: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, open-source test tooling, and teaching/workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience despite it being in the primary stack
Kotlin and Python are absent and Java exposure is dated and limited
Significant portion of recent deep-technical work is in DLang, a niche language outside the target stack

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
